title: proof-scrubber widget params
description: Timeline-style walkthrough of a multi-step proof. The widget emits an empty host div; at runtime the page-global `MVProofScrubber.init('#widgetId', config)` library (js/widget-proof-scrubber.js) builds chrome, a step slider, play/pause control, per-step text readout, and an optional SVG diagram. Each step is `{ title, body, svgInner? }`; the `svgInner` string is appended into the diagram SVG verbatim on step change. A portable frontend can ignore the renderScript and consume the same `steps` array directly.

widgetId.description: DOM id for the outer host `<div class="widget">` that the library mounts into.

title.description: Widget title. Rendered in the chrome header (`.hd > .ttl`) the library builds at init time.

hint.description: Short hint text rendered in `.hd > .hint`. Defaults to the library's standard hint when omitted.

viewBox.description: SVG viewBox for the per-step diagram. Defaults to '0 0 320 160'. Required only when at least one step has `svgInner`.

autoplayMs.description: Dwell time on each step during play, in ms. Defaults to 2000; minimum 400.

steps.description: Ordered array of proof steps. The slider walks 0..N-1; each step's title + body show in the readout, and `svgInner` (if present) is appended to the diagram SVG.

title.description: One-line step title shown above the body.

body.description: HTML body for the step. Supports KaTeX delimiters ($..$, $$..$$, \(..\), \[..\]) — the library re-typesets the readout after each step change.

svgInner.description: Raw SVG inner HTML appended to the diagram on this step. Use SVG element tags directly (no xmlns needed). Omit for steps that are text-only.

sectionComment.description: ARTIFACT. Optional comment placed between `<script>` and `(function(){` as `/* <here> */`. Lets a migrated source preserve its banner comment.
